moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its main tournament play at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Merseyside, running from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Main Event Kick-off
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are ready to tee off! Round 1 of The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Merseyside is buzzing! The Open Championship gets underway tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Get ready for four days of incredible golf on home soil.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Live
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is underway in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, bringing four days of music and culture from July 15-18, 2026.

angles.name: Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is officially LIVE! Four days of incredible music and island atmosphere kicking off today in Stornoway. Who's there?

angles.name: Scottish Culture
angles.copy: Journey to the Outer Hebrides! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is bringing its unique blend of music and culture to Stornoway this week. Pure Scottish vibes.

moments.title: Buddhafield Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Buddhafield Festival, a woodland music and wellbeing festival, is taking place from July 15-19, 2026, offering community and nature-led experiences.

angles.name: Zen Festival Start
angles.copy: Find your zen! Buddhafield Festival starts today, offering a unique blend of music, wellbeing, and nature until Sunday. Embrace the good vibes!

angles.name: Escape to Nature
angles.copy: Seeking a peaceful escape? Buddhafield Festival is now open, celebrating community and connection with the land. A perfect mid-week retreat.

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Year
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival returns to Nottingham's Wollaton Hall for its final year on July 18-19, 2026, featuring headliners The Wombats and Snow Patrol.

angles.name: Final Festival Weekend
angles.copy: This is it! Splendour Festival returns this weekend for its LAST EVER year. Don't miss The Wombats, Snow Patrol & more at Wollaton Hall!

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Farewell
angles.copy: Nottingham, get ready for an emotional weekend! Splendour Festival is saying goodbye after 18 years. Let's make it a send-off to remember. Who are you seeing?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival will celebrate its 20th anniversary at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, with a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: One Week To Go
angles.copy: Just one week until Latitude Festival kicks off its 20th-anniversary celebrations in Suffolk! Who's got their tickets for a weekend of music, comedy & arts?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Week
angles.copy: Henham Park is calling! Latitude Festival is almost here, bringing huge acts and a fantastic atmosphere to Suffolk next week. Your summer starts here!

moments.title: Ann Droid - New BBC Comedy
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid,' a new quirky BBC comedy about a grieving widow who receives a socially awkward eldercare robot, which premiered on July 11, 2026.

angles.name: New Comedy Alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! New BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' is out now and promises plenty of dry wit. Have you watched it yet?

angles.name: Weekend Watchlist
angles.copy: If you need a new laugh, catch 'Ann Droid' on BBC iPlayer. The quirky new comedy starring Diane Morgan is perfect for a mid-week binge!

moments.title: The Dark - ITV Thriller
moments.blurb: ITV's new moody thriller 'The Dark,' starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale and set in the Scottish wilderness, is a new release this July.

angles.name: Chilling New Drama
angles.copy: Need a new thriller? ITV's 'The Dark' is out now, starring Laura Donnelly & Helen Baxendale in the eerie Scottish wilderness. Perfect for a gripping evening!

angles.name: Scottish Scenery, Dark Secrets
angles.copy: Beyond the stunning landscapes, dark secrets unfold. ITV's new thriller 'The Dark' is set to keep you on the edge of your seat. Have you tuned in?

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are now on their summer break, with holidays typically running from late July to late August/early September, though some started earlier in July.

angles.name: Summer's Here!
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many across the UK are now enjoying their summer holidays. What are your plans for soaking up the sun?

angles.name: Family Fun Season
angles.copy: The summer holidays are in full swing! Whether it's staycations or adventures abroad, hope everyone's making the most of the break!

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, frontman of 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday tomorrow to 5SOS frontman Luke Hemmings! What's your favourite 5 Seconds of Summer track?

angles.name: Celebrating 30
angles.copy: The big 3-0 for Luke Hemmings tomorrow! We're celebrating the 5SOS star's birthday with all their biggest hits.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, co-founder and drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the 74th birthday of rock icon Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer of The Police! What's your top Police song?

angles.name: Police Beat
angles.copy: The man behind the beat! Happy 74th birthday to Stewart Copeland of The Police tomorrow. Turn up the classics!

moments.title: Ed Kowalczyk Turns 55
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, lead singer of the rock band Live, celebrates his 55th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Alternative Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday tomorrow to Ed Kowalczyk, the powerful voice of Live! What's your go-to Live anthem?

angles.name: Live's Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating 55 years of Ed Kowalczyk tomorrow! From 'Lightning Crashes' to 'I Alone,' we're playing the best of Live.

moments.title: Tom Fletcher Turns 41
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, lead singer and guitarist of McFly, celebrates his 41st birthday on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: McFly Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday this Friday to McFly's Tom Fletcher! What's your favourite McFly hit to sing along to?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Tom Fletcher's 41st this Friday! The McFly star has given us so many bangers. Which one is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Brian May Turns 79
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Queen Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Rock royalty! This Sunday, we're wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May from Queen! What's his most iconic riff?

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young! Happy Birthday to Queen's Brian May this Sunday. Tune in for a tribute to a true guitar legend.

moments.title: Fred again.. Turns 33
moments.blurb: British DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Dance Music Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again.. this Sunday! What's your favourite track from the electronic maestro?

angles.name: Celebrating the Producer
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Fred again..'s 33rd on Sunday! The producer who brought us so many bangers. What's your top pick?

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Still making waves at 79! Happy Birthday this Monday to the iconic Carlos Santana. What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana's 79th birthday this Monday! His guitar work is simply legendary. Tune in for some classic vibes.

moments.title: Paul Cook Turns 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band The Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Punk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Never mind the bollocks, it's Paul Cook's 70th Birthday this Monday! Celebrating the legendary drummer of The Sex Pistols. What's your favourite punk anthem?

angles.name: Sex Pistols Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 70th to Paul Cook of The Sex Pistols this Monday! The beat behind a revolution. Crank up some classic punk!

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) Turns 78
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, formerly known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21, 2026.

angles.name: Folk Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday this Tuesday to the incredible Yusuf Islam, known to many as Cat Stevens! What's your most loved track from him?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Celebrating the poetic artistry of Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) this Tuesday for his 78th birthday. His songs are truly timeless.

moments.title: Selena Gomez Turns 34
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday this Wednesday to the one and only Selena Gomez! What's your favourite Selena song to blast?

angles.name: Celebrating a Star
angles.copy: From Disney to global pop icon! Wishing Selena Gomez a very Happy 34th Birthday this Wednesday. Get ready for a playlist of her biggest hits!

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday this Wednesday to the legendary Don Henley of the Eagles! What's your favourite track featuring his iconic vocals?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible career of Don Henley on his 79th birthday this Wednesday! A true rock and roll icon. Play some Eagles!

moments.title: George Clinton Turns 86
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Funk Master Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday this Wednesday to the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton! Get ready to get down to some Parliament-Funkadelic!

angles.name: Parliament-Funkadelic
angles.copy: Celebrating the legendary George Clinton's 86th this Wednesday! His influence on music is immeasurable. Time for a funk takeover!
